Green Energy SME Grant

The Green Energy SME Grant provides grant funding to qualifying SMEs investing in clean energy, energy efficiency, and productive green upgrades across South Africa.

Eligibility

  • Applicants must be at least 51 percent black-owned SMEs registered in South Africa.
  • Businesses must have traded for at least 2 years.
  • Applicants must employ between 5 and 50 employees.
  • Funding supports machinery purchase, working capital, and solar equipment.

Funding Offer

Grant funding ranges between R250 000 and R2 million.

The programme budget totals R10 million for the current intake.

No collateral is required.

Timing

Applications close on 15 May 2026.

Approvals are usually issued within 14 to 30 days.

Geography

The programme is available nationally across South Africa.

Required Documents

  • Completed application form
  • Business plan
  • Latest bank statements
Download application form (PDF)

Apply

Apply online using the programme portal.

Apply now
